title: Activate AI infrastructure real-money pilot sleeve
summary: Trade-enable INTC, LITE, and BE only inside the bounded AI_INFRA_PILOT sleeve. Keep the core universe unchanged, use point-in-time eligibility, apply reduced risk scalars, and freeze counterfactual snapshots before any pilot entry.
acceptance_checks: INTC, LITE, and BE are returned by pilot_tickers_as_of('2026-05-01').
Daily run downloads pilot OHLCV/features and emits pilot-specific output fields.
Daily news collection includes pilot tickers in sources and trade-news watchlist.
Core historical backtests remain point-in-time clean because pilot eligibility starts after the three canonical windows.
Pilot sizing and max-concurrent controls are covered by tests.
tests: python -m pytest quant\test_pilot_sleeve.py quant\test_universe_manager.py quant\test_universe_adapter.py quant\test_sources.py
follow_up: Collect live pilot trades and evaluate direct PnL, replacement-relative PnL, and risk-adjusted replacement value before any core promotion.
